source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for English field UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for compact Japanese forms, coordinates, and tabular labels.
layout: Structured 8px grids, vertical reed dividers, field-table density, low shadows, and marsh-water rhythm.

prompts.label: Transparent reed plume motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Reed transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a marsh reed plume botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: An upright reed plume with feathery taupe seed head, long narrow reed-green leaves, straight segmented stem, water-grey cool highlights, and dry marsh texture. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, vertical field silhouette, no willow branch, no wheat.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include full plume, stem, and leaves without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no cattail cylinder, no wheat awns, no pampas grass bouquet, no bamboo, no landscape, no marsh scene, no vase, no hand, no text, no watermark.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Reed light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Reed", derived from the visible marsh reed plume cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible structured field system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Reed, Reed Plume, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from taupe plume fibers, reed-green stems, water-grey marsh reflections, dry reed surfaces, peat ink, and mud-taupe depth. The board must read as reed, not willow, wheat, bamboo, or pampas.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, field dashboard metric cards, map/list filter controls, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, marsh-paper surfaces, reed-green primary actions, taupe plume highlights, water-grey focus rings, vertical stem dividers, field-table density, subtle plume-fiber texture.
Constraints: no willow hanging branches, no wheat harvest imagery, no cattail cylinder, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Reed", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Reed dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Reed". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible marsh reed plume cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Reed, Reed Plume, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the reed system language: peat dark backgrounds, marsh-paper text, reed-green active controls, taupe plume chart highlights, water-grey focus states, mud-taupe borders, vertical stem dividers, plume-fiber texture, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as reed, not willow, wheat, bamboo, or pampas.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, field dashboard metric cards, map/list filter controls, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: peat-ink dark surfaces, marsh-paper foreground, reed-green controls, taupe plume highlights, water-grey rings, mud-taupe separators, subtle plume-fiber overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no willow hanging branches, no wheat harvest imagery, no cattail cylinder, no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Reed".
